REPORT OF COURT APPOINTED REFEREE REGARDING PARTITION SALE OF REAL ESTATE FILED BY OTHER FLIER (RET.) (SBN 050509), HON. RICHARD S.  - COURT APPOINTED REFEREE

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION CONFIRMING SALE OR SETTING ASIDE SALE OF REAL PROPERTY FOLLOWING PARTITION. THE REFEREE MAKES A DISCLOSURE REGARDING THE PROPERTY AND PROCEEDS TO PRESIDE OVER THE SALE. THERE IS NO OVERBID, AND THE COURT CONFIRMS THE SALE OF THE PROPERTY (260-266 COLERIDGE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO) FOR $2,150,000. AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS THE ORDER CONFIRMING SALE. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion Confirming Sale Or Setting Aside Sale Of Real Property Following Partition
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION CONFIRMING SALE OR SETTING ASIDE SALE OF REAL PROPERTY FOLLOWING PARTITION

Appearances: James Braden of the Law Offices of James M. Braden (415.398.6865) for defendant Noah Spurrier; Andrew R. Catterall of Zacks Freedman & Patterson (415.956.8100) for plaintiffs Kumiko Furukawa and Thomas Iannuzzi; Hon. Richard S. Flier (Ret.) of ADR Services (415.772.0900) Court appointed Referee and moving party.

This matter is heard at 10:32 am. The Referee makes a disclosure regarding the property and proceeds to preside over the sale. There is no overbid, and the Court confirms the sale of the property (260-266 Coleridge Street, San Francisco) for $2,150,000. Parties meet and confer privately regarding the form of order. After the hearing, the Court signs the order confirming sale. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs KUMIKO FURUKAWA and THOMAS IANNUZZI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Plaintiff shall prepare order and interlocutory judgment. Parties to meet and confer regarding the form of order and judgment. Order and judgment to be presented to the Court at the hearing. Judge Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
